en: It's something, when I was looking on the web, found something out.
ja: ネットで見つけたんだけど。
zhTW: 我在網上找到一個東西。
vi: Toi tim thay mot thu tren mang.

en: Ricky and Steve laugh Karl- What are you talking about?
vi: Tieng cuoi. Ban dang noi ve cai gi?

en: What? Karl- A- a woman, who had a baby, who was having a baby. Ricky and Steve laugh Ricky- It was no- it was no clearer when you repeated it.

ja: 赤ちゃんを産んだ女性の赤ちゃん。
zhTW: 一個生了孩子的女人的孩子。笑聲。重複一次也沒清楚些。
vi: Mot nguoi phu nu sinh con, co con. Tieng cuoi. Noi lai cung khong ro hon.

en: There was a woman who had a baby, who had a baby, what do you mean? Karl- No, I didn't- I didn't read any more into it, because I just saw that and I thought- Ricky- You didn't read- what?

ja: 赤ちゃんの赤ちゃんって何?もっと読まなかったの?
zhTW: 那是什麼意思？你沒讀更多？什麼？
vi: Y la sao? Ban khong doc them? Gi co?

en: Karl- That's- that's weird, and then I just was thinking, oh, like, imagine the kid at school, at parents' evening.
ko: 그냥 그거 보고 이상하다 생각했고 학교에서 그 애 상상해봤어요 학부모 상담 때. 리키와 스티브 웃음
ja: 学校の保護者面談を想像した。
zhTW: 那很奇怪，然後我在想像那個孩子在學校家長會。
vi: Dieu do ky, roi toi cu hinh dung dua tre o buoi hop phu huynh.

en: Ricky and Steve laugh Ricky- Go on. Karl- And it's like, well, your kid's pretty good, now let's have a look at your work, sort of thing.
ko: 리키와 스티브가 웃어 리키- 계속해. 칼- 그리고 그건, 음, 너의 아이는 꽤 잘하는데, 이제 너의 작업을 좀 보자, 이런 느낌이야.
zhTW: 笑聲。繼續。你的孩子挺好的，現在讓我們看看你的作業。
vi: Tieng cuoi. Tiep di. Con ban kha gioi, bay gio de xem bai cua ban.

en: Ricky- But what? Did the child have a baby? Karl- Yeah. Ricky- Of course it didn't! Play record!

ja: 子供が赤ちゃんを産んだの?もちろん違う!
zhTW: 什麼？那個孩子生了孩子？是的。當然沒有！放音樂！
vi: Gi co? Dua tre sinh con? Co. Tat nhien la khong! Bat nhac!
